html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events

Red Lanterns are items exclusive to Lunar New Year events in Don't Starve Together. They can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at a Shrine and can be equipped in the hand slot.

They do not produce as much light as regular Lanterns, but last much longer at 12 Days.

Year of the Depths Worm

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Depths Worm
A variant of normal Red Lantern is introduced in Year of the Depths Worm event. It is dropped by Gilded Depths Worm. This kind of Red Lantern has different appearance but works exactly the same as normal Red Lantern.

Trivia

  • The Red Lantern was introduced during the Year of the Gobbler event in 2017.

Gallery

  • Wilson holding a Red Lantern.
  • Red Lantern Animation
Tools and WeaponsLunar New Year Events

–Wilson

–Willow
“Wolfgang does not like the dark.”
–Wolfgang

–Wendy
“A LUCKY GLOWBOX”
–WX-78
“What a colorful little lantern.”
–Wickerbottom
“This little light of mine.”
–Woodie
“Not having a light would certainly be unlucky.”
–Maxwell
“Intriguing. There appears to be a red motif to the lanterns here.”
–Wagstaff
“A lucky ward tö guard against the night.”

–Webber

–Walani

–Warly
“Ol' Woodlegs loves a party.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS PARTY TIMES!!”
–Wilba
“Pretty light”
–Wormwood
“Must be some kind of celebration going on here.”
–Wheeler
“Nothing luckier around here than a light.”
–Winona
“What a pretty sight to see!”
–Wortox
“Hm, it look kinda nice.”
–Wurt
“I like this dramatic lighting!”
–Walter
“Luckily for me, the flame can't seem to reach the paper surrounding it.”
–Wanda
Red Lanterns are items exclusive to Lunar New Year events in Don't Starve Together.
They can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at a Shrine and can be equipped in the hand slot.
They do not produce as much light as regular Lanterns, but last much longer at 12 Days.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đèn Lồng Đỏ là vật phẩm dành riêng cho các sự kiện Tết Nguyên Đán trong Don't Starve Together. Chúng có thể được mua bằng cách đổi lấy 3 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn tại Đền thờ và có thể được trang bị trong ô trên tay.

'''Red Lanterns''' are [[items]] exclusive to Lunar New Year [[events]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''.
They can be acquired in exchange for 3 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]]s at a Shrine and can be equipped in the hand slot.

They do not produce as much light as regular [[Lantern]]s, but last much longer at 12 [[Day-Night Cycle|Days]].

{{clr}}

== Year of the Depths Worm ==
{{Object Infobox
|name = Red Lantern
|equipslot=hands
|image = Red Lantern YOTS Dropped.png
|icon = Red Lantern YOTS.png

|canBeBurned = 1
|burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec.}}
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{Event|Year of the Depths Worm}}
A variant of normal Red Lantern is introduced in ''[[Year of the Depths Worm]]'' event. It is dropped by [[Gilded Depths Worm]]. This kind of Red Lantern has different appearance but works exactly the same as normal Red Lantern.

{{clr}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Red Lantern was introduced during the [[Year of the Gobbler]] event in 2017.
